sentences.english: It seems people around the world are in love with snacks!
sentences.korean: 전 세계 사람들이 간식과 사랑에 빠진 것 같아요!

sentences.english: From old favourites like popcorn and crisps to new inventions like the chocolate sandwich, snacks are big business, with an estimated $1.5 trillion a year spent globally on snacking.
sentences.korean: 팝콘, 감자칩부터 초콜릿 샌드위치까지 간식은 큰 사업이에요.

sentences.english: I like salted peanuts and I love a banana — preferably together, actually.
sentences.korean: 소금 땅콩과 바나나를 좋아해요 — 사실 함께 먹으면 더 좋아요.

sentences.english: I find that they hit the spot.

quiz.question: What does '자꾸 손이 가는, 더 먹고 싶은' mean in English?
